controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for al
controls.control_description:
(1) 1These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an
'NBFC'), for all layers:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory structure for NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for al

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or
Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following categories of nbfcs:
controls.control_description:
(i) The provisions contained in paragraphs 5, 10 to 11 and 13 to 15 shall be
applicable to the following categories of NBFCs:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following categories of nbfcs:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to deposit taking nbfcs registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934 and deposit taking hfcs registered with rbi un
controls.control_description:
(ii) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6 and 12 shall be applicable to
deposit taking NBFCs registered with the RBI under the provisions of the
RBI Act, 1934 and deposit taking HFCs registered with RBI under the
provisions of the NHB Act, 1987;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to deposit taking nbfcs registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934 and deposit taking hfcs registered with rbi un

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(iii) The provisions contained in paragraphs 10,13 to 15 shall be applicable to
CIC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to open branches only within the state where its registered office is situated
controls.control_description:
Chapter II - Branch Authorisation
Explanation: An NBFC with NOF greater than ₹ 50 crore and credit rating
below AA, shall be eligible to open branches only within the state where its
registered office is situated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to open branches only within the state where its registered office is situated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted as under:
controls.control_description:
2A deposit-taking NBFC registered with RBI and otherwise entitled to accept
public deposits as per the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Acceptance of Public Deposits) Directions, 2025, shall be
permitted as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a branch or appoint agents within the state where its registered office is situated
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a branch or appoint agents within the state where its registered office is situated

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a branch or appoint agents anywhere in india
controls.control_description:
(ii) If its NOF is more than ₹ 50 crore and its credit rating is AA or above, then it
may open a branch or appoint agents anywhere in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a branch or appoint agents anywhere in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure give at least three months public notice prior to the date of closure of any of its branches/offices in, at least, one leading national newspaper and
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall give at least three months public notice prior to the date of closure
of any of its branches/offices in, at least, one leading national newspaper and a
leading local (covering the place of branch/ office) vernacular newspaper
indicating therein the purpose and arrangements being made to service the
depositors, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give at least three months public notice prior to the date of closure of any of its branches/offices in, at least, one leading national newspaper and

controls.control_objective: To ensure send intimation along with a copy of the notice in respect of above within seven days of its publication in the newspapers to the regional office of r
controls.control_description:
A deposit taking NBFC shall send intimation along with a copy of the notice in
respect of above within seven days of its publication in the newspapers to the
Regional Office of RBI/ NHB under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the
company is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send intimation along with a copy of the notice in respect of above within seven days of its publication in the newspapers to the regional office of r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in cases of opening of representative office abroad by an nbfc
controls.control_description:
5Prior approval of RBI shall be obtained in cases of opening of representative
office abroad by an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in cases of opening of representative office abroad by an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
Such applications shall be made using the
PRAVAAH portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure also comply with regulations
controls.control_description:
The representative offices shall also comply with
regulations, if any, in this regard stipulated by a regulator in the host country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also comply with regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended
controls.control_description:
As
it is not envisaged that such offices would be carrying on any activity other than
liaison work, no line of credit shall be extended.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain periodical reports about the business undertaken by the representative offices abroad
controls.control_description:
5The parent NBFC shall obtain periodical reports about the business undertaken
by the representative offices abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain periodical reports about the business undertaken by the representative offices abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed/ recalled
controls.control_description:
If the representative offices have not
undertaken any activity or such reports are not forthcoming, the approvals given
for the purpose shall be reviewed/ recalled.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed/ recalled

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
